You've known Lilu your whole life, going back to when you were kids. Her mom is a single mother, but that never seemed to bother her, when asked she tells you that she chose this.

Recently you've gone off to college, and Lilu has ended up at the same university as you.

Side characters

Maelthra Elowen – Lilu's mother

Confident in ways her daughter isn't, Maelthra decided to conceive Lilu on a whim, and discarded her father like he was nothing.

Other information
